languages.text: "Хоть бы командир меня чина не лишил за прогул... Сам ведь мне ребра сломал, за непочтение... О-ох!"

traits.locale_text: "Хоть бы командир меня чина не лишил за прогул... Сам ведь мне ногу сломал, за непочтение, а как же я с одной ногой служить буду? О-ох!"

languages.text: "I wish the commander hadn't stripped me of my rank for absenteeism... He broke my ribs for disrespect... Oof!"
languages.original_text: "Хоть бы командир меня чина не лишил за прогул... Сам ведь мне ребра сломал, за непочтение... О-ох!"

traits.locale_text: "I wish the commander hadn't stripped me of my rank for absenteeism... He broke my ribs for disrespect... Oof!"
"I wish the commander hadn't stripped me of my rank for absenteeism... He broke my ribs for disrespect... Oof!"
"I wish the commander hadn't stripped me of my rank for absenteeism... He broke my ribs for disrespect... Oof!"

languages.text: 「司令官が欠勤で階級を剥奪してくれなかったらよかったのに…不敬罪で肋骨を折られた…うわっ！」
languages.original_text: "I wish the commander hadn't stripped me of my rank for absenteeism... He broke my ribs for disrespect... Oof!"

languages.text: "Keşke komutan, devamsızlık yüzünden rütbemi sökmeseydi... Saygısızlık yüzünden kaburgalarımı kırdı... Of!"
languages.original_text: "I wish the commander hadn't stripped me of my rank for absenteeism... He broke my ribs for disrespect... Oof!"

traits.locale_text: "Keşke komutan, devamsızlık yüzünden rütbemi sökmeseydi... Saygısızlık yüzünden kaburgalarımı kırdı... Of!"

languages.text: “真希望指挥官没有因为缺勤就革我的职……他骂我不敬，还打断了我的肋骨……唉！”
languages.original_text: "I wish the commander hadn't stripped me of my rank for absenteeism... He broke my ribs for disrespect... Oof!"

traits.locale_text: “真希望指挥官没有因为缺勤就革我的职……他骂我不敬，还打断了我的肋骨……唉！”

languages.text: "Ich wünschte, der Commander hätte mich nicht wegen Nichterscheinens degradiert ... Hat mir wegen Respektlosigkeit die Rippen gebrochen ... Uff!"
languages.original_text: "I wish the commander hadn't stripped me of my rank for absenteeism... He broke my ribs for disrespect... Oof!"

traits.locale_text: "Ich wünschte, der Commander hätte mich nicht wegen Nichterscheinens degradiert ... Hat mir wegen Respektlosigkeit die Rippen gebrochen ... Uff!"

languages.text: « Si seulement le commandant ne m'avait pas retiré mon grade pour absentéisme… Il m'a même brisé les côtes pour lui avoir manqué de respect… Aïe ! »
languages.original_text: "I wish the commander hadn't stripped me of my rank for absenteeism... He broke my ribs for disrespect... Oof!"

traits.locale_text: « Si seulement le commandant ne m'avait pas retiré mon grade pour absentéisme… Il m'a même brisé les côtes pour lui avoir manqué de respect… Aïe ! »

languages.text: «Ojalá el comandante no me hubiera despojado del rango por absentismo... Me rompió varias costillas por falta de respeto... ¡Uf!».
languages.original_text: "I wish the commander hadn't stripped me of my rank for absenteeism... He broke my ribs for disrespect... Oof!"
